globalRules: Every technical sketch must have a required embedded try-it unless explicitly conceptualOnly.
Embedded try-it IDs and exercise keys must start with try- and follow try-<topic-id>-sketchN.
Every code_input exercise must include full starterFiles and full solutionFiles when it uses a workspace.
solutionFiles must include unchanged starter files too; solutionFiles are snapshots, not diffs.
Module project and capstone step N+1 starterFiles must equal step N solutionFiles.
Do not place generated output files such as reports/summary.txt in requiredFiles.

notes: Teach class files, constructors, methods, object state, encapsulation, validation, imports, and helpers.
Do not introduce inheritance, polymorphism, or abstraction yet.
Use multifile try-it exercises from the start: main.py plus models/ or helpers/.
Teach inheritance, overriding, polymorphism, and abstraction/base-class contracts cumulatively.
Use models/base_item.py, subclass files, and services that operate on mixed object lists.
Testing/debugging/refactoring exercises must target multifile OOP apps.
Use tests/check_*.py, services/, data fixtures, and import/state debugging.
Final capstone must integrate encapsulation, abstraction, inheritance, and polymorphism.
Each capstone step must carry forward the previous complete workspace.
